title: D Delete
text: D Delete Delete existing record or row. Modes None. Conditions The table for which the Delete is requested is open. The previous call to the connector was a Fetch mode 2 which completed successfully. (This is only relevant to DBMSs such as ISAM.) Description For SQL-like DBMSs, the connector identifies exactly one record by either the primary key or the physical record address. For ISAM-like or record-level DBMSs, a Fetch (mode 2) will already have been issued to position on and lock the record. The positioned record is the record which is deleted. Refer to: Uniface Database I/O Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
